summary: Completed frontend-only testing of Supabase authentication implementation for Prop Forge app. Core UI functionality works well, but authentication has critical issues preventing successful registration/login.

critical_bugs.issue: Registration fails with 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error
critical_bugs.details: Supabase signup endpoint returns 400 status, error handling in AuthModal shows JSON parsing error

critical_bugs.issue: Email validation not working for invalid email formats
critical_bugs.impact: Invalid emails can be submitted without client-side validation
critical_bugs.details: validateEmail function exists but error not displayed for invalid email format

ui_bugs.issue: Language toggle click intercepted by modal overlay
ui_bugs.details: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing language toggle clicks when modal is open

passed_tests: App loads correctly with header showing 'sign in' button
AuthModal opens when clicking 'sign in' button
AuthModal has two tabs: 'sign in' and 'sign up'
Can switch between sign in and sign up tabs
Language toggle (ES/EN) works in main app
All main tabs (Chamber, Strategy, Oracle, Gloss) are navigable
AuthModal can be closed with X button
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical Supabase authentication issues: 1) Resolve JSON parsing error in signup/signin flow - likely response handling issue in AuthContext or AuthModal, 2) Fix email validation to properly display error messages for invalid email formats, 3) Test with actual Supabase credentials to ensure service is properly configured
